metadata.reference:
F. Lemarchand, private communications (2013). Index determination is performed using method explained in:
L. Gao, F. Lemarchand, M. Lequime. Comparison of different dispersion models for single layer optical thin film index determination. Thin Solid Films 520, 501-509 (2011)
metadata.comments: 3.96-nm monolayer deposited using the magnetron sputtering technique; thicknesses determined by X-ray diffraction.
